name: Resonate
description: Resonator module (clone of Mutable Instruments Rings). Transforms external excitation audio into pitched sound via modal, sympathetic string, or non-linear string physical modeling. Mono-to-poly polyphony with strumming.

controls.name: Polyphony Setting
controls.description: Selects monophonic, duophonic, or quadraphonic operation. More voices overlap without cutting tails.

controls.name: Resonator Type
controls.description: Selects resonator model: modal (bars/plates), sympathetic strings (comb filters), or non-linear/inharmonic string (extended Karplus-Strong).

controls.name: Frequency (Coarse)
controls.description: Coarse frequency control. Quantized in semitones when a cable is patched to the V/OCT input.
controls.detail: Quantized in semitones when V/OCT patched

controls.name: Structure
controls.description: Harmonic structure. Frequency ratio between partials (modal), detuning of strings (sympathetic), or non-linearity/inharmonicity (string).

controls.name: Brightness
controls.description: Adjusts level of higher harmonics. Acts simultaneously on LPF of exciter (closed at 8 o'clock) and damping filter on higher modes.

controls.name: Damping
controls.description: Controls the decay time of the sound.

controls.name: Position
controls.description: Excitation position on the string/surface. Similar to PWM on a square oscillator or comb-filtering of a phaser.

controls.name: Attenuverters (4x)
controls.description: Attenuverters for the CV inputs (Frequency, Structure, Brightness, Position/Damping).
controls.detail: Bipolar · FREQUENCY CV normalized to small constant for fine tune use

inputs.name: STRUM
inputs.description: Strumming trigger input. Freezes current voice, lets it decay, starts next voice. Normalized to step detector on V/OCT and transient detector on IN.
inputs.normalizedTo: V/OCT step detector / IN transient detector

inputs.name: V/OCT
inputs.description: 1V/octave CV pitch control for main resonator frequency.

inputs.name: IN
inputs.description: Audio excitation signal input. Normalized to internal pulse/burst generator that reacts to V/OCT changes or STRUM triggers.

inputs.name: Frequency CV
inputs.description: CV input for Frequency parameter. Normalized to small constant allowing attenuverter as fine tune when unpatched.

outputs.name: ODD
outputs.description: Odd output. In mono: odd-numbered partials (modal) or one picking position (string). In poly: odd-numbered voices. Mix of both if EVEN is unpatched.

outputs.name: EVEN
outputs.description: Even output. In mono: even-numbered partials or complementary component. In poly: even-numbered voices. Must be patched to split signals.

behaviors.name: Modal Resonator
behaviors.description: Simulates resonance of vibrating structures (bars, plates, strings) using a bank of band-pass filters. Structure sets frequency ratio between partials.

behaviors.name: Sympathetic Strings
behaviors.description: Simulates strings that vibrate in response to other strings using comb filters. Structure sets tuning ratio between the strings for extra overtones.

behaviors.name: Non-linear/Inharmonic String
behaviors.description: Extended Karplus-Strong with non-linearities and dispersion all-pass filter. Structure sets degree of inharmonicity.

behaviors.name: Internal Excitation
behaviors.description: When IN is unpatched, the module generates its own excitation signal (LP-filtered pulse or noise burst depending on resonator type) on each note change or STRUM.

behaviors.name: Polyphonic Strumming
behaviors.description: In 2 or 4-voice polyphony, successive notes overlap without cutting each other's tails. Rapidly send different pitches to create chords by strumming.

patchIdeas.name: Self-contained melodic resonator
patchIdeas.patch: Sequencer → V/OCT only · no other patches · module generates excitation and strums internally
patchIdeas.diagram:
RESONATE:
* Resonator Type: Modal
* Polyphony: 1 voice
- Sequencer (CV) p> Resonate (V/OCT) // step changes trigger internal excitation
- Resonate (ODD) -> Mixer (In)

patchIdeas.name: Drum hits as exciter
patchIdeas.patch: Snare or click → IN · sequencer → V/OCT · STRUM unpatched · modal resonator
patchIdeas.diagram:
RESONATE:
* Resonator Type: Modal
- Drum (Out) -> Resonate (IN) // percussive exciter
- Sequencer (CV) p> Resonate (V/OCT)
- Resonate (ODD) -> Mixer (In)
- Resonate (EVEN) -> Mixer (In)

patchIdeas.name: Polyphonic chords
patchIdeas.patch: 4-voice polyphony · sequencer → V/OCT rapidly · ODD + EVEN to mixer for full chord
patchIdeas.diagram:
RESONATE:
* Polyphony: 4 voices
- Sequencer (CV) p> Resonate (V/OCT) // rapid notes strum chord
- Resonate (ODD) -> Mixer (In)
- Resonate (EVEN) -> Mixer (In)
